evidence_boundary: descriptive single-realization midpoint check; not optimization, design, safety, or site calibration
purpose: add four within-range midpoint cases to inspect local linearity along L and m axes
shared_load_case: RAC external AQWA plus fluctuating cutter load

soil_x_response_policy.not_quantity: positioning-spud relative displacement against buffer trolley
soil_x_response_policy.quantity: positioning-spud relative longitudinal displacement against fixed soil reference
